g.text: Primary key. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.
Primary key. Foreign key to Vendor.BusinessEntityID.
The average span of time (in days) between placing an order with the vendor and receiving the purchased product.
nullable; The selling price when last purchased.
nullable; Date the product was last received by the vendor.
The maximum quantity that should be ordered.
The minimum quantity that should be ordered.
nullable; The quantity currently on order.
Date and time the record was last updated.
Primary key. Foreign key to PurchaseOrderHeader.PurchaseOrderID.
identity(1,1); Primary key. One line number per purchased product.
Date the product is expected to be received.
Product identification number. Foreign key to Product.ProductID.
Vendor's selling price of a single product.
Per product subtotal. Computed as OrderQty * UnitPrice.
Quantity actually received from the vendor.
Quantity accepted into inventory. Computed as ReceivedQty - RejectedQty.
Date and time the record was last updated.
Incremental number to track changes to the purchase order over time.
Order current status. 1 = Pending; 2 = Approved; 3 = Rejected; 4 = Complete
Employee who created the purchase order. Foreign key to Employee.BusinessEntityID.
Vendor with whom the purchase order is placed. Foreign key to Vendor.BusinessEntityID.
Shipping method. Foreign key to ShipMethod.ShipMethodID.
nullable; Estimated shipment date from the vendor.
Purchase order subtotal. Computed as SUM(PurchaseOrderDetail.LineTotal)for the appropriate PurchaseOrderID.
Total due to vendor. Computed as Subtotal + TaxAmt + Freight.
Date and time the record was last updated.
identity(1,1); Primary key for ShipMethod records.
ROWGUIDCOL number uniquely identifying the record. Used to support a merge replication sample.
Date and time the record was last updated.
Primary key for Vendor records. Foreign key to BusinessEntity.BusinessEntityID
1 = Superior, 2 = Excellent, 3 = Above average, 4 = Average, 5 = Below average
0 = Do not use if another vendor is available. 1 = Preferred over other vendors supplying the same product.
0 = Vendor no longer used. 1 = Vendor is actively used.
Date and time the record was last updated.

svg.text: BusinessEntityID: Foreign key constraint referencing Vendor.BusinessEntityID.
PurchaseOrderID: Foreign key constraint referencing PurchaseOrderHeader.PurchaseOrderID.
ShipMethodID: Foreign key constraint referencing ShipMethod.ShipMethodID.
VendorID: Foreign key constraint referencing Vendor.VendorID.
